notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler grounds into a double play, shortstop Anthony Volpe to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. Brooks Lee out at 2nd. Ryan Kreidler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Anthony Volpe.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Anthony Volpe.

notableEvents.label: Jasson Domínguez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jasson Domínguez grounds into a double play, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Royce Lewis. Trent Grisham scores. Ben Rice out at 2nd. Jasson Domínguez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Anthony Volpe.
